'''hamuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldling|oldling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldling|oldling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hamuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæmihith|hæmihith]] || [[word:hæmihij|hæmihij]] || [[word:hæmihish|hæmihish]] || [[word:hæmihi|hæmihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hamumuhuth|hamumuhuth]] || [[word:hamumuhuj|hamumuhuj]] || [[word:hamumuhush|hamumuhush]] || [[word:hamumuhu|hamumuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hamuhuth|hamuhuth]] || [[word:hamuhuj|hamuhuj]] || [[word:hamuhush|hamuhush]] || [[word:hamuhu|hamuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hamufhuth|hamufhuth]] || [[word:hamufhuj|hamufhuj]] || [[word:hamufhush|hamufhush]] || [[word:hamufhuf|hamufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hamuhuthu|hamuhuthu]] || [[word:hamuhuju|hamuhuju]] || [[word:hamuhushu|hamuhushu]] || [[word:hamuhuku|hamuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hamuhuth|hamuhuth]] || [[word:hamuhuj|hamuhuj]] || [[word:hamuhush|hamuhush]] || [[word:hamuhu|hamuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hamuhuthul|hamuhuthul]] || [[word:hamuhujul|hamuhujul]] || [[word:hamuhushul|hamuhushul]] || [[word:hamuhukul|hamuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hamuhuthuthu|hamuhuthuthu]] || [[word:hamuhujuju|hamuhujuju]] || [[word:hamuhushushu|hamuhushushu]] || [[word:hamuhuku|hamuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hamuhuthun|hamuhuthun]] || [[word:hamuhujun|hamuhujun]] || [[word:hamuhushun|hamuhushun]] || [[word:hamuhukun|hamuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hamuhuthuoro|hamuhuthuoro]] || [[word:hamuhujuoro|hamuhujuoro]] || [[word:hamuhushuoro|hamuhushuoro]] || [[word:hamuhukuoro|hamuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
